should_trigger: Run a STRIDE analysis of the admin console.
Identify the attack surface of the new webhook receiver.
What are the security threats to the payment callback endpoint?
Map trust boundaries for the multi-tenant worker pool.
should_not_trigger: Scan the npm dependencies for known CVEs.
Review the OAuth flow for token handling issues.
Scan the repo for leaked API keys.
Design the system architecture for the service.
Write the runbook for the security-incident response.
Check that the SOC2 compliance boxes are ticked.
